string.description: Text value in basic (escape-supporting) or literal (raw) form

integer.description: 64-bit signed integer supporting decimal, hex, octal, and binary notation

boolean.description: Boolean value, always lowercase true or false

datetime.description: RFC 3339 date-time, can be offset, local, date-only, or time-only

array.description: Ordered collection of values, can contain mixed types in TOML 1.0

table.description: Named collection of key-value pairs, the primary organizational structure

inline_table.description: Compact table defined on a single line within curly braces
